# init(_:)

**Initializer**

Convert Attributes to CreationAttributes. This init will fail if [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVBuffer/CreationAttributes/pixelFormatType] or [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVBuffer/CreationAttributes/size] properties are absent.

## Declaration

```swift
init?(_ attributes: CVBuffer.Attributes)
```
title: init(_:)
